headlines.description: Arsenal began their new Premier League campaign with a 2-1 home win over Nottingham Forest on Saturday thanks to first-half goals from Eddie Nketiah and Bukayo Saka.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal beat Forest in Premier League opener

events.name: West Ham United at AFC Bournemouth

headlines.description: A late equaliser by Dominic Solanke ensured Bournemouth's new manager Andoni Iraola marked his first game in the Premier League with a 1-1 draw at home to West Ham United on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Solanke earns Bournemouth point at home to West Ham

events.name: Luton Town at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Brighton & Hove Albion spoiled any hopes of a successful start to Luton Town's top-flight return with a comprehensive 4-1 home win over the Hatters in their Premier League clash on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brighton win ruins Luton's top-flight return

headlines.description: Bobby De Cordova-Reid led a smash and grab for Fulham when he scored with a rare shot on target in their 1-0 Premier League victory over a wasteful Everton at Goodison Park on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: De Cordova-Reid earns Fulham fortunate win at Everton

headlines.description: A second-half strike from Odsonne Edouard was enough to earn Crystal Palace a 1-0 win at Sheffield United, giving the hosts an unhappy return to the Premier League after a two-year absence.
headlines.shortLinkText: Edouard scores as Palace spoil Sheffield's Premier League return

headlines.description: Newcastle United midfielder Sandro Tonali netted on his league debut and striker Alexander Isak added two more goals as the Magpies beat Aston Villa 5-1 in their first game of the new Premier League season at St. James' Park on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Newcastle hit 5 past Villa in opening game rout
